mediaPlayer.title: Desktop Player
mediaPlayer.description: Seanime has built-in support for MPV, VLC, IINA and MPC-HC.
mediaPlayer.defaultPlayerHelp: Player that will be used to open files and track your progress automatically.
mediaPlayer.iinaSettingsNote: For IINA to work correctly with Seanime, make sure that
mediaPlayer.keepWindowOpenAfterPlaybackFinished: Keep window open after playback finished
mediaPlayer.automaticallyPlayNextEpisodeHelp: If enabled, Seanime will play the next episode after a delay when the current episode has ended.
mediaPlayer.mpvHelp: Leave empty to use the CLI.
mediaPlayer.iinaHelp: Leave empty to use the CLI.
mediaPlayer.externalPlayerLinkDescription: Send streams to an external player on this device.
mediaPlayer.encodeFilePathInUrl: Encode file path in URL (library only)
mediaPlayer.encodeFilePathInUrlHelp: If enabled, the file path will be base64 encoded in the URL to avoid issues with special characters.

playback.title: Video Playback
playback.description: Choose how anime is played on this device
playback.noExternalPlayerCustomSchemeSet: No external player custom scheme set
playback.useBuiltInPlayerHelp: When enabled, all media playback will use the built-in player (overrides settings below)
playback.downloadedMediaDescription: Choose how to play anime files stored on your device
playback.desktopMediaPlayerHelp: Open files in your system player with automatic tracking
playback.transcodingDirectPlayHelp: Play in the browser with transcoding
playback.externalPlayerLinkHelp: Send stream URLs to another application
playback.torrentDebridStreamingDescription: Choose how to play streamed content from torrents and debrid services

externalPlayerLink.title: External Player Link
externalPlayerLink.customSchemeHelp: Custom URL scheme for opening external links.
externalPlayerLink.mediaLinkHelp: The link will be opened with the specified scheme.
